data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT_LIGHTWEIGHT: {"version":1,"epicId":"4931-f639","generatedAt":"2026-04-16T16:26:40Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Ticket system validation and classification layer: validate, classify, quality gates","description":"Absorbs 7 deterministic ticket validation/classification scripts into the ticket CLI as opinionated subcommands. Lightweight mode enrichment: no stories created (MODERATE+High routing). Implementation-plan will decompose directly from the enriched epic.","successCriteria":["Seven new subcommands callable via dispatcher: validate, classify, clarity-check, check-ac, quality-check, summary, purge-bridge.","Each subcommand has an integration test asserting output equivalence with the script it replaces.","classify uses deterministic keyword scoring (no LLM); poetry environment resolution documented."]},"stories":[],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":0,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":[]}}
